steps.title: Resolve the mitigation gap
steps.content: The report focuses more on birds than arthropods, yet conservationists think the mitigations protect all wildlife. That only makes sense if the bird-focused measures also reduce the noise effects on arthropods.

steps.title: Reject non-solutions
steps.content: Choice B only says bird species can differ. Choice C compares documentation levels, not protection. Choice D says bird measures can harm arthropods, which would undermine the conservationists' satisfaction. The needed bridge is shared protection. The answer is A.
